title: Mobile data is prohibitively expensive in low-income countries
subtitle: Cost of data-only 5GB mobile package as a share of non-food household budget
source: International Telecommunication Union (ITU), World Bank’s Poverty and Inequality Platform (PIP), Mahler et al. (2022), and U.S. Department of Agriculture Economic Research Service.
visdescription: Chart showing the cost of a data package relative to a household’s budget, by income group, and relative to food expenditure.
prompt_text: Can everyone afford to use AI?
keyFactLabel: of households' budget remaining after food consumption in low-income countries would be taken up by a data-only 5GB mobile package.
legendLabelRemainingBudget: Remaining household budget,  after food consumption
